tree.name: Asa Newell
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Derik Queen to Pelicans for Asa Newell and a 2026 1st round draft pick (most favorable of NOP and MIL).
tree.note: Forward acquired on draft night in exchange for the #13 pick Derik Queen.

assetsGivenUp.name: Derik Queen
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks' own #13 pick in 2025 draft. Maryland big man, traded to NOP on draft night for Asa Newell and a 2026 1st.
